section_titles: Conduct of Business by the Company Pending the Merger

classified_clauses.section_title: Conduct of Business by the Company Pending the Merger
classified_clauses.original_text: (a) The Company agrees that, between the date of this Agreement and the earlier of the Effective Time and the termination of this Agreement in accordance with its terms (the "Pre-Closing Period"), except (i) as required by applicable Law or with the prior written consent of Parent (such consent not to be unreasonably withheld, conditioned or delayed), (ii) as expressly contemplated by any other provision of this Agreement or (iii) as set forth in Section 5.01 of the Company Disclosure Schedule, the Company shall, and shall cause the Company Subsidiaries, to, use reasonable best efforts to conduct the businesses of the Company Group only in the ordinary course of business and, to the extent consistent therewith, use reasonable best efforts to: (A) preserve substantially intact the business organization, material assets and material properties and business relations of the Company Group, (B) keep available the services of its executive officers and key employees on commercially reasonable terms, (C) maintain in effect all material licenses, permits, consents, franchises and approvals and authorizations, and (D) maintain satisfactory relationships of the Company Group with any persons with which the Company Group has material business relations and with Governmental Authorities that have jurisdiction over its business and operations.
classified_clauses.processed_text: (a) The the Company agrees that, between the date of this Agreement and the earlier of the Effective Time and the termination of this Agreement in accordance with its terms (the "Pre-Closing Period"), except (i) as required by applicable Law or with the prior written consent of Parent (such consent not to be unreasonably withheld, conditioned or delayed), (ii) as expressly contemplated by any other provision of this Agreement or (iii) as set forth in Section 5.01 of the Company Disclosure Schedule, the Company shall, and shall cause the Company Subsidiaries, to, use reasonable best efforts to conduct the businesses of the Company Group only in the ordinary course of business and, to the extent consistent therewith, use reasonable best efforts to: (A) preserve substantially intact the business organization, material assets and material properties and business relations of the Company Group, (B) keep available the services of its executive officers and key employees on commercially reasonable terms, (C) maintain in effect all material licenses, permits, consents, franchises and approvals and authorizations, and (D) maintain satisfactory relationships of the Company Group with any persons with which the Company Group has material business relations and with Governmental Authorities that have jurisdiction over its business and operations.
classified_clauses.cluster_theme: Pre-Closing Conduct of Business and Operations Restrictions

classified_clauses.section_title: Conduct of Business by the Company Pending the Merger
classified_clauses.original_text: Without limiting Section 5.01(a), and as an extension thereof, except as expressly contemplated by any other provision of this Agreement, as set forth in Section 5.01 of the Company Disclosure Schedule or as required by applicable Law, neither the Company nor any Company Subsidiary shall, during the Pre-Closing Period, do any of the following without the prior written consent of Parent (such consent not to be unreasonably withheld, conditioned or delayed):
classified_clauses.processed_text: Without limiting Section 5.01(a), and as an extension thereof, except as expressly contemplated by any other provision of this Agreement, as set forth in Section 5.01 of the Company Disclosure Schedule or as required by applicable Law, neither the Company nor any the Company Subsidiary shall, during the Pre-Closing Period, do any of the following without the prior written consent of Parent (such consent not to be unreasonably withheld, conditioned or delayed):
classified_clauses.cluster_theme: Pre-Closing Conduct of Business and Operations Restrictions

classified_clauses.section_title: Conduct of Business by the Company Pending the Merger
classified_clauses.original_text: (i) amend or otherwise change its certificate of incorporation, by-laws or other similar organizational documents (including the Company Charter and the Company Bylaws);
classified_clauses.processed_text: (i) amend or otherwise change its certificate of incorporation, by-laws or other similar organizational documents (including the Company Charter and the Company Bylaws);
classified_clauses.cluster_theme: Restrictions on Amending Organizational and Governing Documents

classified_clauses.section_title: Conduct of Business by the Company Pending the Merger
classified_clauses.original_text: (ii) issue, grant, sell, dispose of, encumber or authorize such issuance, sale, disposition or encumbrance of, any Equity Interests of the Company or any Company Subsidiary other than the issuance of (A) any Company RSUs (including Performance Contingent RSUs and SIP Awards) in the ordinary course pursuant to the Company Stock Plans subject to the agreed upon budget set forth in Section 5.01(b)(ii) of the Company Disclosure Schedule, (B) any shares of Company Common Stock upon the exercise or settlement of Company Options or Company RSUs (including Performance Contingent RSUs and SIP Awards) in accordance with the terms of those Company Options or Company RSUs (including Performance Contingent RSUs conditions and SIP Awards), as applicable, outstanding on the date hereof or issued (or modified) after the date hereof in accordance with this Section 5.01, (C) pursuant to any offering period that is open as of the date of this Agreement under the Company ESPP and (D) any Equity Interests of any Subsidiary of the Company to the Company or any other Subsidiary of the Company;
classified_clauses.processed_text: (ii) issue, grant, sell, dispose of, encumber or authorize such issuance, sale, disposition or encumbrance of, any Equity Interests of the Company or any the Company Subsidiary other than the issuance of (A) any the Company RSUs (including Performance Contingent RSUs and SIP Awards) in the ordinary course pursuant to the Company Stock Plans subject to the agreed upon budget set forth in Section 5.01(b)(ii) of the Company Disclosure Schedule, (B) any shares of the Company Common Stock upon the exercise or settlement of the Company Options or the Company RSUs (including Performance Contingent RSUs and SIP Awards) in accordance with the terms of those the Company Options or the Company RSUs (including Performance Contingent RSUs conditions and SIP Awards), as applicable, outstanding on the date hereof or issued (or modified) after the date hereof in accordance with this Section 5.01, (C) pursuant to any offering period that is open as of the date of this Agreement under the Company ESPP and (D) any Equity Interests of any Subsidiary of the Company to the Company or any other Subsidiary of the Company;
classified_clauses.cluster_theme: Prohibition on Issuing or Encumbering Capital Stock and Equity Securities

classified_clauses.section_title: Conduct of Business by the Company Pending the Merger
classified_clauses.original_text: (iii) declare, set aside, make or pay any dividend or other distribution, payable in cash, shares, property or otherwise, with respect to any of Equity Interests of the Company or any Company Subsidiary, except for dividends or other distributions by any direct or indirect wholly owned Company Subsidiary to the Company or any other direct or indirect wholly owned Company Subsidiary;
classified_clauses.processed_text: (iii) declare, set aside, make or pay any dividend or other distribution, payable in cash, shares, property or otherwise, with respect to any of Equity Interests of the Company or any the Company Subsidiary, except for dividends or other distributions by any direct or indirect wholly owned the Company Subsidiary to the Company or any other direct or indirect wholly owned the Company Subsidiary;
classified_clauses.cluster_theme: Prohibition on Dividends and Distributions During Interim Period

classified_clauses.section_title: Conduct of Business by the Company Pending the Merger
classified_clauses.original_text: (iv) reclassify, combine, split, subdivide or redeem, or purchase or otherwise acquire, directly or indirectly, any Equity Interests of the Company or any Company Subsidiary, except in connection with any net exercise, net settlement or "sell to cover" transaction with respect to any Company Options or Company RSUs (including Performance Contingent RSUs and SIP Awards), in each case, in accordance with their terms;
classified_clauses.processed_text: (iv) reclassify, combine, split, subdivide or redeem, or purchase or otherwise acquire, directly or indirectly, any Equity Interests of the Company or any the Company Subsidiary, except in connection with any net exercise, net settlement or "sell to cover" transaction with respect to any the Company Options or the Company RSUs (including Performance Contingent RSUs and SIP Awards), in each case, in accordance with their terms;
classified_clauses.cluster_theme: Prohibitions on Stock Splits, Reclassifications, and Share Repurchases

classified_clauses.section_title: Conduct of Business by the Company Pending the Merger
classified_clauses.original_text: (v) sell, transfer, lease, sublease, license, mortgage, pledge, encumber, allow to lapse, assign, abandon, disclaim, dedicate to the public, incur any Lien on (other than a Permitted Lien) or otherwise dispose of, or authorize any of the foregoing with respect to, any of its material properties, assets, licenses, operations, rights, businesses or interests therein (but not including Intellectual Property, which is the subject of Section 5.01(b)(xvii)) except (A) as required by Contracts or Company Leases in force on the date of this Agreement, (B) such dispositions of assets no longer used in the ordinary course of business of the Company's or the applicable Company Subsidiary's business as conducted as of the date of this Agreement or (C) such dispositions among the Company and the Company Subsidiaries;
classified_clauses.processed_text: (v) sell, transfer, lease, sublease, license, mortgage, pledge, encumber, allow to lapse, assign, abandon, disclaim, dedicate to the public, incur any Lien on (other than a Permitted Lien) or otherwise dispose of, or authorize any of the foregoing with respect to, any of its material properties, assets, licenses, operations, rights, businesses or interests therein (but not including Intellectual Property, which is the subject of Section 5.01(b)(xvii)) except (A) as required by Contracts or the Company Leases in force on the date of this Agreement, (B) such dispositions of assets no longer used in the ordinary course of business of the Company's or the applicable the Company Subsidiary's business as conducted as of the date of this Agreement or (C) such dispositions among the Company and the Company Subsidiaries;
classified_clauses.cluster_theme: Prohibitions on Sale Transfer or Encumbrance of Company Assets

classified_clauses.section_title: Conduct of Business by the Company Pending the Merger
classified_clauses.original_text: (vi) acquire (including by amalgamation, merger, consolidation or acquisition of Equity Interests or assets or any other business combination) (A) any company, corporation, partnership, other business organization (or any division thereof) or (B) any real property other than such acquisitions that do not exceed $20,000,000 individually or $50,000,000 in the aggregate;
classified_clauses.processed_text: (vi) acquire (including by amalgamation, merger, consolidation or acquisition of Equity Interests or assets or any other business combination) (A) any company, corporation, partnership, other business organization (or any division thereof) or (B) any real property other than such acquisitions that do not exceed $20,000,000 individually or $50,000,000 in the aggregate;
classified_clauses.cluster_theme: Prohibition on Acquisitions and Business Combinations During Interim Period

classified_clauses.section_title: Conduct of Business by the Company Pending the Merger
classified_clauses.original_text: (vii) (A) repurchase, prepay or incur any indebtedness for borrowed money or issue any debt securities, or issue or sell options, warrants, calls or other rights to acquire any of its debt securities, (B) make any loans, advances or capital contributions to, or investments in, any other person (other than a Company Subsidiary) or (C) assume, guarantee, endorse or otherwise become liable or responsible for the indebtedness or other obligations of another person (other than indebtedness incurred between the Company and any of its wholly owned Subsidiaries or between any of such wholly owned Subsidiaries and guarantees by the Company on behalf of any Company Subsidiary);
classified_clauses.processed_text: (vii) (A) repurchase, prepay or incur any indebtedness for borrowed money or issue any debt securities, or issue or sell options, warrants, calls or other rights to acquire any of its debt securities, (B) make any loans, advances or capital contributions to, or investments in, any other person (other than a the Company Subsidiary) or (C) assume, guarantee, endorse or otherwise become liable or responsible for the indebtedness or other obligations of another person (other than indebtedness incurred between the Company and any of its wholly owned Subsidiaries or between any of such wholly owned Subsidiaries and guarantees by the Company on behalf of any the Company Subsidiary);
classified_clauses.cluster_theme: Prohibitions on Incurring or Modifying Debt and Guarantees

classified_clauses.section_title: Conduct of Business by the Company Pending the Merger
classified_clauses.original_text: (viii) enter into, amend, waive (including any right thereunder), renew or voluntarily terminate (other than as a result of the expiration or non-renewal of any Contract in accordance with its terms, as such terms are in effect on the date of this Agreement) any Material Contract (or any other Contract that would be deemed a Material Contract if it had been entered into or amended prior to the date of this Agreement) or any Company Lease (or any other Contract that would be deemed a Company Lease if it had been entered into or amended prior to the date of this Agreement), other than in the ordinary course of business; provided that, for purposes of this Section 5.01(b)(viii), the phrase "other than in the ordinary course of business" shall not be construed to permit (A) the entry into, amendment, waiver, renewal or termination of any Material Contract of the type described in Section 3.15(a)(vi) or Section 3.15(a)(vii) or (B) the taking of any action prohibited by any other subsection of this Section 5.01(b);
classified_clauses.processed_text: (viii) enter into, amend, waive (including any right thereunder), renew or voluntarily terminate (other than as a result of the expiration or non-renewal of any Contract in accordance with its terms, as such terms are in effect on the date of this Agreement) any Material Contract (or any other Contract that would be deemed a Material Contract if it had been entered into or amended prior to the date of this Agreement) or any the Company Lease (or any other Contract that would be deemed a the Company Lease if it had been entered into or amended prior to the date of this Agreement), other than in the ordinary course of business; provided that, for purposes of this Section 5.01(b)(viii), the phrase "other than in the ordinary course of business" shall not be construed to permit (A) the entry into, amendment, waiver, renewal or termination of any Material Contract of the type described in Section 3.15(a)(vi) or Section 3.15(a)(vii) or (B) the taking of any action prohibited by any other subsection of this Section 5.01(b);
classified_clauses.cluster_theme: Restrictions on Modifying, Terminating, or Entering Material Contracts

classified_clauses.section_title: Conduct of Business by the Company Pending the Merger
classified_clauses.original_text: (ix) authorize, or make any commitment with respect to, capital expenditures, (A) for the twelve (12)-month period ended December 31, 2026, that in the aggregate exceed $65,000,000, and (B) for the twelve (12)-month period ended December 31, 2027, that in the aggregate exceed $45,000,000;
classified_clauses.processed_text: (ix) authorize, or make any commitment with respect to, capital expenditures, (A) for the twelve (12)-month period ended December 31, 2026, that in the aggregate exceed $65,000,000, and (B) for the twelve (12)-month period ended December 31, 2027, that in the aggregate exceed $45,000,000;
classified_clauses.cluster_theme: Budget-Based Limitations on Capital Expenditures During Interim Period

classified_clauses.section_title: Conduct of Business by the Company Pending the Merger
classified_clauses.original_text: (x) except as otherwise required under any Plan in effect as of the date hereof, (A) increase the cash compensation payable or to become payable to Employee or Non-Employee Service Providers (other than in the ordinary course of business, consistent with past practice, provided that the aggregate cost is less than or equal to five percent (5%) of such cash compensation in the aggregate on a calendar year basis), (B) grant or amend any retention, severance or termination pay to, or enter into any employment, bonus, incentive, equity, change of control or severance agreement with, any Employee (or any individual who would be an Employee if employed on the date hereof) or Non-Employee Service Provider, other than any standard offer letters entered into in the ordinary course of business with any newly-hired Employee below the level of vice president (provided that such hiring is permitted by this Section 5.01) and that provide for no more than six (6) months' severance, (C) pay any annual bonus or annual incentive compensation in excess of the amount earned based on actual performance in accordance with the applicable Plan, (D) establish, adopt, enter into, terminate or materially amend any Plan, or establish, adopt or enter into any plan, agreement, program, policy, trust, fund or other arrangement that would be a Plan if it were in existence as of the date of this Agreement, for the benefit of any Employee or Non-Employee Service Provider, provided that the foregoing, either individually or in the aggregate, shall not result in a material increase in costs to the Company or any Company Subsidiary, (E) loan or advance any money or other property to any Employee or Non-Employee Service Provider or (F) establish, adopt, enter into or amend any Labor Agreement;
classified_clauses.processed_text: (x) except as otherwise required under any Plan in effect as of the date hereof, (A) increase the cash compensation payable or to become payable to Employee or Non-Employee Service Providers (other than in the ordinary course of business, consistent with past practice, provided that the aggregate cost is less than or equal to five percent (5%) of such cash compensation in the aggregate on a calendar year basis), (B) grant or amend any retention, severance or termination pay to, or enter into any employment, bonus, incentive, equity, change of control or severance agreement with, any Employee (or any individual who would be an Employee if employed on the date hereof) or Non-Employee Service Provider, other than any standard offer letters entered into in the ordinary course of business with any newly-hired Employee below the level of vice president (provided that such hiring is permitted by this Section 5.01) and that provide for no more than six (6) months' severance, (C) pay any annual bonus or annual incentive compensation in excess of the amount earned based on actual performance in accordance with the applicable Plan, (D) establish, adopt, enter into, terminate or materially amend any Plan, or establish, adopt or enter into any plan, agreement, program, policy, trust, fund or other arrangement that would be a Plan if it were in existence as of the date of this Agreement, for the benefit of any Employee or Non-Employee Service Provider, provided that the foregoing, either individually or in the aggregate, shall not result in a material increase in costs to the Company or any the Company Subsidiary, (E) loan or advance any money or other property to any Employee or Non-Employee Service Provider or (F) establish, adopt, enter into or amend any Labor Agreement;
classified_clauses.cluster_theme: Interim Period Restrictions on Employee Compensation and Benefit Changes

classified_clauses.section_title: Conduct of Business by the Company Pending the Merger
classified_clauses.original_text: (xi) other than in the ordinary course of business below the level of vice president for any Employee, hire or terminate (other than for cause) the employment of any Employee (or any individual who would be an Employee if employed on the date hereof);
classified_clauses.processed_text: (xi) other than in the ordinary course of business below the level of vice president for any Employee, hire or terminate (other than for cause) the employment of any Employee (or any individual who would be an Employee if employed on the date hereof);
classified_clauses.cluster_theme: Restrictions on Hiring, Terminating, and Promoting Senior Employees

classified_clauses.section_title: Conduct of Business by the Company Pending the Merger
classified_clauses.original_text: (xii) exercise discretion with respect to or otherwise voluntarily accelerate the lapse of restriction, achievement of performance or vesting of any equity or equity-based awards as a result of the Merger, except as expressly provided in this Agreement;
classified_clauses.processed_text: (xii) exercise discretion with respect to or otherwise voluntarily accelerate the lapse of restriction, achievement of performance or vesting of any equity or equity-based awards as a result of the Merger, except as expressly provided in this Agreement;
classified_clauses.cluster_theme: Restrictions on Accelerating Vesting of Equity Awards and Compensation

classified_clauses.section_title: Conduct of Business by the Company Pending the Merger
classified_clauses.original_text: (xiii) (A) initiate, settle or propose to settle any Action, other than (1) settlements for monetary damages (net of insurance proceeds) involving not more than $5,000,000 in the aggregate and that do not (x) require any material actions or impose any material restrictions or ongoing royalty or other future payment obligations on the business or operations of the Company Group, or after the Effective Time, Parent or its Subsidiaries or (y) include the admission of wrongdoing by any member of the Company Group and (2) Transaction Litigation, which is the subject of, and shall be governed by Section 6.11 or (B) settle (or propose to settle) any investigation or inquiry by any Governmental Authority, including by entering into any consent decree or other similar agreement;
classified_clauses.processed_text: (xiii) (A) initiate, settle or propose to settle any Action, other than (1) settlements for monetary damages (net of insurance proceeds) involving not more than $5,000,000 in the aggregate and that do not (x) require any material actions or impose any material restrictions or ongoing royalty or other future payment obligations on the business or operations of the Company Group, or after the Effective Time, Parent or its Subsidiaries or (y) include the admission of wrongdoing by any member of the Company Group and (2) Transaction Litigation, which is the subject of, and shall be governed by Section 6.11 or (B) settle (or propose to settle) any investigation or inquiry by any Governmental Authority, including by entering into any consent decree or other similar agreement;
classified_clauses.cluster_theme: Monetary Thresholds for Settling Legal Proceedings and Actions

classified_clauses.section_title: Conduct of Business by the Company Pending the Merger
classified_clauses.original_text: (xiv) (A) change the Company's financial accounting policies or procedures in effect as of December 31, 2024, other than as required by Law or GAAP or (B) write up, write down or write off the book value of any of its assets, other than (1) in the ordinary course of business or (2) as may be required by Law or GAAP, as approved by the Company's independent public accountants;
classified_clauses.processed_text: (xiv) (A) change the Company's financial accounting policies or procedures in effect as of December 31, 2024, other than as required by Law or GAAP or (B) write up, write down or write off the book value of any of its assets, other than (1) in the ordinary course of business or (2) as may be required by Law or GAAP, as approved by the Company's independent public accountants;
classified_clauses.cluster_theme: Restrictions on Changes to Accounting Policies and Asset Valuations

classified_clauses.section_title: Conduct of Business by the Company Pending the Merger
classified_clauses.original_text: (xv) adopt a plan of complete or partial liquidation or resolutions providing for a complete or partial liquidation, dissolution, restructuring, recapitalization or other reorganization of the Company, any of the Company Subsidiaries;
classified_clauses.processed_text: (xv) adopt a plan of complete or partial liquidation or resolutions providing for a complete or partial liquidation, dissolution, restructuring, recapitalization or other reorganization of the Company, any of the Company Subsidiaries;
classified_clauses.cluster_theme: Prohibition on Liquidation, Dissolution, Restructuring and Fundamental Corporate Changes

classified_clauses.section_title: Conduct of Business by the Company Pending the Merger
classified_clauses.original_text: (xvi) (A) change or adopt (or file a request to change or adopt) any material method of Tax accounting or any annual Tax accounting period, (B) make, change or rescind any material Tax election, (C) file any material Tax Return relating to the Company or any of the Company Subsidiaries that has been prepared in a manner that is inconsistent with past practices, as applicable, (D) settle or compromise any claim, investigation, audit or controversy relating to material Taxes, (E) surrender any right to claim a material Tax refund, (F) file any material amended Tax Return, (G) enter into any closing agreement with respect to any material Tax or (H) waive or extend the statute of limitations with respect to any material Tax Return other than pursuant to extensions of time to file Tax Returns obtained in the ordinary course of business;
classified_clauses.processed_text: (xvi) (A) change or adopt (or file a request to change or adopt) any material method of Tax accounting or any annual Tax accounting period, (B) make, change or rescind any material Tax election, (C) file any material Tax Return relating to the Company or any of the Company Subsidiaries that has been prepared in a manner that is inconsistent with past practices, as applicable, (D) settle or compromise any claim, investigation, audit or controversy relating to material Taxes, (E) surrender any right to claim a material Tax refund, (F) file any material amended Tax Return, (G) enter into any closing agreement with respect to any material Tax or (H) waive or extend the statute of limitations with respect to any material Tax Return other than pursuant to extensions of time to file Tax Returns obtained in the ordinary course of business;
classified_clauses.cluster_theme: Restrictions on Tax Elections, Returns, and Administrative Actions

classified_clauses.section_title: Conduct of Business by the Company Pending the Merger
classified_clauses.original_text: (xvii) (A) abandon, disclaim, fail to prosecute, maintain or enforce, dedicate to the public, allow to lapse, sell, assign, transfer, encumber or incur any Lien (other than Permitted Liens) on, any Owned Intellectual Property or material Licensed Intellectual Property except (1) as required by Contracts in force on the date of this Agreement or (2) such assignments, transfers or other dispositions among the Company and the Company Subsidiaries; (B) license or sublicense any Intellectual Property to any third party, other than non-exclusive licenses or non-exclusive sublicenses granted to customers or service providers in the ordinary course of business; or (C) disclose any trade secrets or confidential information to any person, other than Representatives of the Company or a Company Subsidiary that are subject to appropriate confidentiality and non-disclosure obligations, in each case in the ordinary course of business, or other than to Parent or any of its Affiliates in connection with the Transactions;
classified_clauses.processed_text: (xvii) (A) abandon, disclaim, fail to prosecute, maintain or enforce, dedicate to the public, allow to lapse, sell, assign, transfer, encumber or incur any Lien (other than Permitted Liens) on, any Owned Intellectual Property or material Licensed Intellectual Property except (1) as required by Contracts in force on the date of this Agreement or (2) such assignments, transfers or other dispositions among the Company and the Company Subsidiaries; (B) license or sublicense any Intellectual Property to any third party, other than non-exclusive licenses or non-exclusive sublicenses granted to customers or service providers in the ordinary course of business; or (C) disclose any trade secrets or confidential information to any person, other than Representatives of the Company or a the Company Subsidiary that are subject to appropriate confidentiality and non-disclosure obligations, in each case in the ordinary course of business, or other than to Parent or any of its Affiliates in connection with the Transactions;
classified_clauses.cluster_theme: Restrictions on Sale, License, Abandonment of Company Intellectual Property

classified_clauses.section_title: Conduct of Business by the Company Pending the Merger
classified_clauses.original_text: (xviii) enter into, amend, waive or terminate (other than terminations in accordance with their terms) any Affiliate Transaction; or
classified_clauses.processed_text: (xviii) enter into, amend, waive or terminate (other than terminations in accordance with their terms) any Affiliate Transaction; or
classified_clauses.cluster_theme: Restrictions on Implementing New Policies and Strategic Operational Changes

classified_clauses.section_title: Conduct of Business by the Company Pending the Merger
classified_clauses.original_text: (xix) agree, resolve, announce an intention, enter into any formal or informal agreement or otherwise make a commitment, to do any of the foregoing.
classified_clauses.processed_text: (xix) agree, resolve, announce an intention, enter into any formal or informal agreement or otherwise make a commitment, to do any of the foregoing.
classified_clauses.cluster_theme: Prohibition on Agreements or Commitments to Circumvent Other Covenants

classified_clauses.section_title: Control of Operations
classified_clauses.original_text: Without limiting Section 5.01 or Section 5.02, nothing contained in this Agreement shall give Parent or the Company, directly or indirectly, the right to control or direct the operations of the Company or Parent, as applicable, prior to the Closing. Prior to the Closing, each party shall exercise, consistent with and subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement, including Section 5.01 (in the case of the Company) and or Section 5.02 (in the case of Parent and Merger Sub), control and supervision over such matters.
classified_clauses.processed_text: Without limiting Section 5.01 or Section 5.02, nothing contained in this Agreement shall give Parent or the Company, directly or indirectly, the right to control or direct the operations of the Company or Parent, as applicable, prior to the Closing. Prior to the Closing, each party shall exercise, consistent with and subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement, including Section 5.01 (in the case of the Company) and or Section 5.02 (in the case of Parent and Merger Sub), control and supervision over such matters.
classified_clauses.cluster_theme: Clarification That Buyer Has No Pre-Closing Control Rights
